title: Senior Teacher - StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies family as a Senior Teacher in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies:
StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
